title: Week 1: Arrays and Hashing
description: Practice fundamental array operations and hash table techniques

title: Week 2: Linked Lists and Stacks
description: Master linked list operations and stack implementations

title: Week 3: Trees and Graphs
description: Explore tree traversals and graph algorithms

title: Dynamic Programming Mastery
description: Advanced DP problems and optimization techniques

title: Week 4: Dynamic Programming Intro
description: Introduction to memoization and tabulation through classic DP problems

title: Week 2: Memory Management
description: Study virtual memory, paging strategies, and page replacement algorithms

title: Graph Algorithms Deep Dive
description: Master BFS, DFS, shortest paths, and advanced graph traversal problems

title: JavaScript & String Fundamentals
description: Core logic, string parsing, and prefix-based algorithms used in web development

title: Data Structures for Web Developers
description: Hash maps, arrays, and grouping techniques commonly applied in frontend and backend systems

title: Beginner Coding Challenges
description: Entry-level problems covering stacks, subarrays, and basic control flow

title: Intermediate Problem Solving
description: Medium-difficulty problems spanning interval merging and frequency analysis

title: Advanced Data Structures
description: Hard problems involving LRU caches, tree serialization, and advanced design patterns
